info.title: dotnet-umbrella-ts
info.description: This package contains .NET Core tooling to allow the Umbrella.TypeScript generators to be used with the dotnet CLI.

options.name: --input
options.description: The physical path to the folder containing the assemblies to scan for TypeScript attributes.

options.name: --assemblies
options.description: The names of the assemblies to scan for attributes. If not supplied all assemblies in the folder path will be scanned.

options.name: --runtime-assemblies
options.description: The names of the assemblies to load into memory upon which the assemblies being scanned depend.

options.name: --property-mode
options.description: The TypeScriptPropertyMode to use: [None, Null, Model]. This value is case sensitive.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path where the output file will be written.

options.name: --knockout-decorators
options.description: Specifies that generated Knockout types will use decorators instead of explicit observables.

options.name: --validation
options.description: Specify this flag to enable validation dependencies to be included.
